role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the linguistic domain by noting the lack of script evidence.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and settlement patterns, staying strictly within landscape analysis.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (scrub, grassland, palm) and biome transitions without drifting into infrastructure.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road construction (curbs, width) and utility infrastructure (poles, tanks) as regulatory/infrastructure markers.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (JoJo tanks, camera generation) to distinguish the region, fitting the meta role.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified South Africa. The specialists provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence (JoJo tanks, rondavels, high-veld terrain). The tournament successfully used this evidence to eliminate distractors (Namibia, Botswana, Lesotho) and confirm the truth.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of red soil, hills, and huts match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of scrub and the single palm tree match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the concrete curb and green tanks match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Identification of JoJo tanks and camera quality is accurate.
